name: travel-planning
description: End-to-end trip planning with live data — flights & hotels via SerpApi (Google Flights/Hotels), Booking.com inventory via RapidAPI (booking-com15), Airbnb stays via the OpenBNB MCP, and routes/places/distances via the Google Routes & Places APIs. Ships a plan-trip skill, a travel-planner sub-agent, and a guided /travel-setup for API keys. Airbnb search works with no key at all; add SERPAPI_API_KEY (250/mo free), GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY, and RAPIDAPI_KEY (50/mo free) for the full experience.
